mapper.sql: select id, conversation_id, message_id, feedback_user_id, feedback_user_name, feedback_type, reason, suggestion, status, accepted_qa_id, create_time, update_time from bot_feedback
mapper.insert: insert into bot_feedback(conversation_id, message_id, feedback_user_id, feedback_user_name, feedback_type, reason, suggestion, status, create_time, update_time) values(#{conversationId}, #{messageId}, #{feedbackUserId}, #{feedbackUserName}, #{feedbackType}, #{reason}, #{suggestion}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
